product.title: Redragon K535 APAS RGB Backlit Wired, Bluetooth Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
product.body_html:
Redragon K535 APAS Wired, Bluetooth Mechanical Gaming Keyboard, RGB Backlit, Blue Switches

Redragon K535 wireless, Bluetooth mechanical gaming keyboard, RGB backlit Multi-Device wireless mechanical gaming keyboard featuring ultra-fast lag free wired or wireless connection via 2.4G Wireless, Bluetooth 5.0 or Type-C Wired. We offer the best price in Pakistan for gaming keyboards. The keyboard can pair up to 3 devices and can be used wired while charging. Full-sized 100% Low Profile Gaming Keyboard with 104 keys; comes with dustproof mechanical Blue switches.

RGB Backlit

18 different Backlight modes & effects, 5 brightness levels, adjustable breathing speed, the illumination can be completely turned off. The keycaps offer clear uniform backlighting. Supports Plug & Play plus additional software download, available.

Anti-Ghosting all 104 keys are conflict-free (n-Key) rollover featuring 12 multimedia keyboard keys and a non-slip ergonomic, splash-proof design comes with  high-speed corrosion-free USB-C to USB-A connector for a reliable connection. For more information visit the official international brand store.

Compatibility:

Compatible with Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Or Windows XP, Limited Mac OS Keyboard support works well with all major Computers Brands and Gaming PCs.

Redragonzone. pk offers the best prices in Pakistan for gaming products. Visit the Product Page for more latest Products.
